steps.title: Translate the first condition
steps.content:
The phrase Carrie has 4 times as many dollars as Marjani means Carrie's dollars equal 4 times Marjani's dollars:
$$c = 4m$$

steps.title: Translate the second condition
steps.content:
The phrase together they have a total of \$40 means their combined dollars equals 40:
$$c + m = 40$$
Combining these, our system is $c = 4m$ and $c + m = 40$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
